description: The `Pip3Package` DSC Resource allows you to install, update, and uninstall Python packages using pip3.
author: DscSamples

embedded.description: The `Pip3Package` DSC Resource allows you to install, update, and uninstall Python packages using pip3.

PackageName.title: PackageName
PackageName.description: The name of the Python package to manage. This is a key and mandatory property.

Version.title: Version
Version.description: The version of the Python package to manage. If not specified, the latest version will be used.

Arguments.title: Arguments
Arguments.description: Additional arguments to pass to pip3.

Exist.title: Exist
Exist.description: Indicates whether the package should exist. Defaults to $true.

InstalledPackages.title: InstalledPackages
InstalledPackages.description: A list of installed packages. This property is not configurable.

embedded.title: PythonPip3Dsc/Pip3Package
